name: Gedan Barai
description: Downward sweeping block used to defend against low attacks.

name: Oi Zuki
description: Stepping punch delivered with forward momentum.

name: Age Uke
description: Rising block to defend against high attacks.

name: Shuto Uke
description: Knife-hand block used for deflecting attacks to the side.

name: Gyaku Zuki
description: Reverse punch executed with the rear hand.

name: Mae Geri
description: Front kick delivered to the midsection or lower target.

name: Yoko Uke
description: Side block used to redirect lateral attacks.

name: Kosa Uke
description: Crossing block technique used to intercept attacks.
